keyPoints: Data Preparation: Handling missing values, data cleaning
Concatenating Data: Using `concat()` function to join dataframes
Data Transformation: Using `applymap()` function to apply a function to each element
Discretization: Using `pd.qcut()` function to divide data into bins
Binning: Using `pd.cut()` function to create bins for categorical data
Permutation: Using `sample()` function to shuffle data
String Manipulation: Using `str.lower()` function to convert strings to lowercase
Data Alignment: Using `merge()` function to join dataframes based on a common column
Data Aggregation: Using `groupby()` function to perform aggregation operations
